DURBOLT.COM · SALES@DURBOLT.COM
DURBOLT POWER
ABOUT DURBOLT POWER
COMPANY OVERVIEW

Built for
Critical Infrastructure.

Durbolt Power is a B2B-direct supplier of industrial power generation, distribution, energy storage, connectivity, and cooling infrastructure. We source factory-direct from certified manufacturers worldwide and supply procurement teams, EPCs, and engineering firms across 50+ countries — from the U.S. to the UAE, Saudi Arabia, Egypt, and beyond.

20+
Years of Experience

Established supplier of critical power infrastructure across global markets.

500+
Projects Delivered

Data centers, hospitals, utilities, telecoms, oil & gas, and government.

50+
Countries Served

Active supply chains across the USA, Middle East, Africa, and South Asia.

$100M+
Sourced to Date

Factory-direct B2B pricing. No middlemen. No markup on margin.

FOUR DIVISIONS · 44 PRODUCT LINES
DIV. 01
Power Generation & Protection
15 products
DIV. 02
Power Distribution & Control
14 products
DIV. 03
Connectivity & Cooling
13 products
DIV. 04
Grid-Scale Energy Infrastructure
2 products
ALL PRODUCTS CERTIFIED TO:
IEC UL CE ANSI ISO 9001 IEEE
01
DURBOLT POWER
DIVISION 01
DIVISION 01 — 15 PRODUCTS

Power Generation & Protection

Where reliability begins.

Industrial-grade generation and protection systems engineered for continuous, uninterrupted power in the most demanding critical infrastructure environments.

01 Industrial Generator Sets
02 Automatic Transfer Switches
03 Manual Transfer Switches
04 Load Banks
05 Industrial UPS Systems
06 Battery Energy Storage (BESS)
07 Lithium Battery Modules
08 Auto Voltage Regulators
09 Surge Protection Devices
+6 MORE
DURBOLT POWER · PRODUCT CATALOGUE 2025
DIV. 01 — Power Generation & Protection
PRODUCT 01 OF 15
P.04
Industrial Generator Sets
Industrial Generator Sets — Durbolt Power
DIV. 01

Industrial Generator Sets

500kW–5MW, diesel, STAMFORD alternators

Electrical
Rated Output 500kW – 5,000kW (625kVA – 6,250kVA)
Output Voltage 380V / 400V / 415V / 480V (3Φ)
Frequency 50Hz / 60Hz (selectable)
Power Factor 0.8 lagging
Mechanical
Engine Brand MTU / Cummins / Perkins / Doosan
Fuel Type Diesel (EN 590 / ASTM D975)
Cooling Radiator-cooled, 40°C ambient rated
Alternator STAMFORD, IE3-class efficiency
Environmental & Protection
Noise Level 75–85 dB(A) at 7m (open set)
Enclosure IP23 base; IP44 with acoustic canopy
Operating Temp -10°C to +50°C
Altitude Up to 1,000m ASL (derating above)
CERTIFICATIONS
CE ISO 8528 UL 2200 ISO 9001:2015 Tier 4 Final
APPLICATIONS

Data Centers · Hospitals · Industrial Plants · Oil & Gas · Utilities

Unit configuration, color, and finish may vary depending on project requirements and specifications.

REQUEST QUOTE SALES@DURBOLT.COM →
DIV. 01 — Power Generation & Protection
PRODUCT 02 OF 15
P.05
Automatic Transfer Switches
Automatic Transfer Switches — Durbolt Power
DIV. 01

Automatic Transfer Switches

400A–4000A, NEMA 1/3R, open or closed transition

Electrical
Current Rating 400A – 4,000A
Voltage 208V / 240V / 480V / 600V (3Φ+N)
Frequency 50Hz / 60Hz
Transition Type Open or Closed (make-before-break)
Mechanical
Enclosure NEMA 1 / NEMA 3R
Mounting Floor or wall-mount
Maintenance Bypass Optional
Control & Communications
Transfer Delay Programmable 0–60 sec
Retransfer Delay Programmable 0–30 min
Communications RS-485 / Modbus RTU
Standard IEEE 446
CERTIFICATIONS
UL 1008 IEC 60947-6-1 CSA C22.2 NEMA ICS 2
APPLICATIONS

Critical Power Backup · Generator Changeover · Data Centers · Healthcare · Industrial

Unit configuration, color, and finish may vary depending on project requirements and specifications.

REQUEST QUOTE SALES@DURBOLT.COM →
DIV. 01 — Power Generation & Protection
PRODUCT 03 OF 15
P.06
Manual Transfer Switches
Manual Transfer Switches — Durbolt Power
DIV. 01

Manual Transfer Switches

200A–3200A, fusible or non-fusible

Electrical
Current Rating 200A – 3,200A
Voltage 240V / 480V / 600V (3Φ+N)
Frequency 50Hz / 60Hz
Type Fusible or non-fusible
Mechanical
Enclosure NEMA 1 / NEMA 3R
Switching Dead-center-off, double-throw
Material Heavy-duty steel
CERTIFICATIONS
UL 98 UL 977 CSA C22.2 NEMA KS 1
APPLICATIONS

Generator Backup · Utility Changeover · Industrial · Commercial

Unit configuration, color, and finish may vary depending on project requirements and specifications.

DIV. 01 — Power Generation & Protection
PRODUCT 04 OF 15
P.07
Load Banks
Load Banks — Durbolt Power
DIV. 01

Load Banks

50kW–2MW, resistive / reactive / capacitive

Electrical
Power Range 50kW – 2,000kW
Voltage 208V / 480V / 4.16kV / 13.8kV
Frequency 50Hz / 60Hz
Load Types Resistive / Reactive / Capacitive
Mechanical
Cooling Forced air (1–2 m³/s per 100kW)
Enclosure NEMA 1 / IP54 outdoor option
Mounting Skid / trailer / containerized
Control
Auto Load Sequencing Yes
Communications Modbus TCP/IP, RS-485
Display Digital load monitoring
CERTIFICATIONS
CE UL CSA NFPA 110
APPLICATIONS

Generator Testing · UPS Commissioning · Data Center Validation · Rental

Unit configuration, color, and finish may vary depending on project requirements and specifications.

DIV. 01 — Power Generation & Protection
PRODUCT 05 OF 15
P.08
Industrial UPS Systems
Industrial UPS Systems — Durbolt Power
DIV. 01

Industrial UPS Systems

10kVA–800kVA, 3-phase, rack or floor-standing

Electrical
Power Range 10kVA – 800kVA
Input Voltage 380V / 400V / 480V (3Φ)
Output Voltage 380V / 400V / 480V (±1%)
Topology Double-conversion (online)
Battery
Battery Type VRLA AGM (standard); Li-ion optional
Backup Time 5 min – 4 hrs (configurable)
Charger Smart temperature-compensated
Mechanical
Form Factor 19" rack or floor-standing cabinet
Bypass Static and manual maintenance bypass
Parallel Redundancy Up to 4 units (N+1 to N+3)
SNMP Yes (network card included)
CERTIFICATIONS
CE UL 1778 IEC 62040-1/2/3 IEC 61000 Class C2
APPLICATIONS

Data Centers · Hospitals · Industrial Control · Telecom · Financial

Unit configuration, color, and finish may vary depending on project requirements and specifications.

DIV. 01 — Power Generation & Protection
PRODUCT 06 OF 15
P.09
Battery Energy Storage (BESS)
Battery Energy Storage (BESS) — Durbolt Power
DIV. 01

Battery Energy Storage (BESS)

100kWh–10MWh, LFP chemistry, grid-scale

Energy
Usable Capacity 100kWh – 10MWh (scalable)
Chemistry LFP (LiFePO4)
Cycle Life ≥6,000 cycles at 80% DoD
Calendar Life 15+ years
Power
C-Rate 0.5C – 1C (charge/discharge)
DC Voltage 600V – 1,500V
PCS Power 50kW – 5MW
Grid Response <100ms
System
BMS Active cell balancing, SOC/SOH monitoring
Cooling Air-cooled or liquid-cooled
Fire Suppression FM-200 or NOVEC 1230
Container 20ft or 40ft ISO, IP54
CERTIFICATIONS
IEC 62619 UL 9540 UN 38.3 CE IEEE 1547
APPLICATIONS

Peak Shaving · Frequency Regulation · Grid Stabilization · Backup Power · Renewable Integration

Unit configuration, color, and finish may vary depending on project requirements and specifications.

DIV. 01 — Power Generation & Protection
PRODUCT 07 OF 15
P.10
Lithium Battery Modules
Lithium Battery Modules — Durbolt Power
DIV. 01

Lithium Battery Modules

LFP 48V/100Ah stackable, rack format

Electrical
Nominal Voltage 48V (LFP)
Capacity 100Ah (4.8kWh per module)
Scalable 2–20 modules per bank (9.6kWh – 96kWh)
Cycle Life ≥6,500 cycles at 80% DoD
Mechanical
Form Factor 19" rack-mount, 3U per module
Weight ~30kg per module
Dimensions (W×D×H) 438 × 400 × 133mm
IP Rating IP20 (indoor rack)
BMS
Cell Balancing Active balancing
Protection Over-charge, over-discharge, short-circuit, over-temp
Communications RS-485, CAN, RS-232
CERTIFICATIONS
IEC 62619 UL 1973 CE UN 38.3
APPLICATIONS

UPS Replacement · Telecom Backup · Industrial DC Power · Off-grid Systems

Unit configuration, color, and finish may vary depending on project requirements and specifications.

DIV. 01 — Power Generation & Protection
PRODUCT 08 OF 15
P.11
Auto Voltage Regulators
Auto Voltage Regulators — Durbolt Power
DIV. 01

Auto Voltage Regulators

±0.5% regulation, 5kVA–2000kVA, servo type

Electrical
Power Range 5kVA – 2,000kVA
Input Voltage Range ±20% of nominal
Output Regulation ±0.5% of setpoint
Voltage Options 110V / 220V / 380V / 415V (±15%)
Mechanical
Type Servo-motor controlled (motorized variac)
Correction Speed 50–100V/s
Waveform Pure sine wave (zero distortion)
Bypass Manual bypass included
Performance
Response Time <0.5s
Overload 120% for 30s; 150% for 5s
CERTIFICATIONS
CE ISO 9001:2015
APPLICATIONS

CNC Machinery · Medical Equipment · Telecom · Industrial Controls · Labs

Unit configuration, color, and finish may vary depending on project requirements and specifications.

DIV. 01 — Power Generation & Protection
PRODUCT 09 OF 15
P.12
Surge Protection Devices
Surge Protection Devices — Durbolt Power
DIV. 01

Surge Protection Devices

Type 1+2+3, 25–100kA impulse rating, DIN rail

Electrical
Type Type 1 + Type 2 + Type 3 (combined)
Impulse Current (Iimp) 25kA – 100kA
Max Discharge Current (Imax) 40kA – 200kA
Protection Level (Up) ≤1.0kV
Mechanical
Mounting DIN rail (35mm TS35)
Module Width 18mm per module
Status Indicator Green/red window
Remote Alarm Dry contact available
CERTIFICATIONS
IEC 61643-11 UL 1449 4th Ed. EN 61643-11
APPLICATIONS

Industrial Control Panels · Data Centers · Telecom · Renewable Energy · Commercial Buildings

Unit configuration, color, and finish may vary depending on project requirements and specifications.

DIV. 01 — Power Generation & Protection
PRODUCT 10 OF 15
P.13
Diesel Fuel Storage Tanks
Diesel Fuel Storage Tanks — Durbolt Power
DIV. 01

Diesel Fuel Storage Tanks

UL 142 double-wall, 150–10,000 gallon

Capacity
Range 150 – 10,000 gallon
Standard Sizes 150, 300, 500, 1,000, 2,000, 5,000, 10,000 gal
Custom Larger sizes available on request
Construction
Standard UL 142 (aboveground steel)
Wall Type Double-wall (interstitial monitoring)
Primary Material Carbon steel
Coating Internal epoxy lining; external primer + enamel
Fittings & Accessories
Fuel Level Float gauge + sight glass
Fittings 2" NPT fill/vent, 1" supply/return
Optional Automated level sensor, day tank systems
Pressure Test 3 psi factory tested
CERTIFICATIONS
UL 142 NFPA 30 NFPA 110
APPLICATIONS

Generator Day Tanks · Bulk Fuel Storage · Emergency Reserves · Industrial Plants

Unit configuration, color, and finish may vary depending on project requirements and specifications.

P.14
Industrial Exhaust Systems
Industrial Exhaust Systems — Durbolt Power
DIV. 01

Industrial Exhaust Systems

Critical silencers, -35dB attenuation, stainless

Performance
Noise Attenuation -35dB (critical silencer grade)
Back Pressure <25 mmWg (500–1000mm dia)
Temperature Rating Up to 650°C continuous
Flow Range 500 CFM – 50,000 CFM
Construction
Material 304 stainless steel (standard); 316SS marine
Insulation Rock wool, 50mm, aluminum cladding
Expansion Joints Stainless flex bellows
Silencer Type Reactive + absorptive (critical grade)
CERTIFICATIONS
CE ISO 14163 ISO 11821
APPLICATIONS

Diesel Generator Sets · Gas Turbines · Industrial Engines · Marine

Unit configuration, color, and finish may vary depending on project requirements and specifications.

Weatherproof Enclosures

DIV. 01

Weatherproof Enclosures

IP65/NEMA 4X, mild or 316 stainless steel

Protection
IP Rating IP65 / NEMA 4X
Material Mild steel or 316L stainless steel
Door Single or double-door, 3-point latching
Gasket Polyurethane foam, continuous perimeter seal
Dimensions
Width 200mm – 2,400mm (custom)
Height 200mm – 2,400mm (custom)
Depth 100mm – 600mm (custom)
Finish RAL 7035 (standard); custom RAL on request
Accessories
Mounting Plate G2 galvanized backplate (standard)
Ventilation Filtered fan, louvre, or sealed (optional)
Entry Cable glands, conduit knockouts
Impact IK10 (optional)
CERTIFICATIONS
CE IEC 60529 UL 508A
APPLICATIONS

Residential Energy Storage Systems
Residential Energy Storage Systems — Durbolt Power
DIV. 01

Residential Energy Storage Systems

5kWh–20kWh wall-mount LiFePO4, 6,500+ cycles, grid/off-grid, integrated BMS

Energy
Usable Capacity 5kWh – 20kWh (scalable)
Chemistry LiFePO4 (LFP)
Cycle Life ≥6,500 cycles at 80% DoD
Calendar Life 10+ years
Power
Continuous Power 3kW – 10kW (model-dependent)
Peak Power 5kW – 15kW (10 sec)
DC Voltage 48V – 60V nominal
Operation Modes Grid-tie, off-grid, backup
System
Form Factor Wall-mount, space-efficient
BMS Integrated active BMS
Monitoring LED status + Wi-Fi / RS-485 app
Operating Temp -10°C to +50°C
CERTIFICATIONS
IEC 62619 UL 9540 CE RoHS IP55
APPLICATIONS

Home Solar Storage · Grid Backup · Off-grid Living · EV Charging · Load Shifting

Liquid-Cooled Industrial BESS Cabinet
Liquid-Cooled Industrial BESS Cabinet — Durbolt Power
DIV. 01

Liquid-Cooled Industrial BESS Cabinet

50kWh–500kWh all-in-one, integrated PCS + BMS + cooling, air or liquid cooled

Energy
Usable Capacity 50kWh – 500kWh per cabinet
Chemistry LiFePO4 (LFP)
Cycle Life ≥8,000 cycles at 90% DoD
Round-trip Efficiency ≥94%
Power
PCS Power 25kW – 250kW (integrated)
DC Bus Voltage 600V – 800V
AC Output 3Φ 380V / 400V / 480V
Thermal & Safety
Cooling Type Liquid-cooled (glycol loop) or air-cooled
Thermal Management Cell-level temperature control ±2°C
Ambient Rating -20°C to +55°C
Fire Suppression Aerosol or FM-200
CERTIFICATIONS
IEC 62619 UL 9540 CE IP54 IEEE 1547
APPLICATIONS

Industrial Microgrids · Peak Shaving · Demand Response · Renewable Firming

Unit configuration, color, and finish may vary depending on project requirements and specifications.

PRODUCT 15 OF 15
P.18
Integrated Solar + BESS Skid System
Integrated Solar + BESS Skid System — Durbolt Power
DIV. 01

Integrated Solar + BESS Skid System

500kW solar + 1MWh LFP BESS, containerized turnkey, grid-tie or off-grid

Solar
PV Capacity 500kW (standard; custom sizing available)
Inverter Efficiency ≥98.4%
MPPT Channels 4–8 (configuration-dependent)
PV Voltage Up to 1,500V DC
Storage
BESS Capacity 1MWh LFP (standard); 0.5–5MWh scalable
Chemistry LiFePO4, ≥6,000 cycles
Discharge Duration 1–4 hours
Round-trip Efficiency ≥92%
System
Mode Grid-tie or off-grid (island mode)
Container 20ft or 40ft ISO, containerized
Commissioning Factory pre-tested, plug-and-play
EMS Integrated, cloud SCADA-compatible
CERTIFICATIONS
CE IEC 62619 UL 9540 IEC 61727 IEEE 1547
APPLICATIONS

Remote Power · Utility-Scale Solar · Microgrids · Mining · Oil & Gas

Unit configuration, color, and finish may vary depending on project requirements and specifications.

02
DURBOLT POWER
DIVISION 02
DIVISION 02 — 14 PRODUCTS

Power Distribution & Control

Precision at every junction.

Complete power distribution infrastructure from medium voltage switchgear to copper busbar — engineered for modern industrial facilities and mission-critical data centers.

01 Modular Electrical Switchgear
02 Motor Control Centers (MCC)
03 Busway & Busduct Systems
04 Medium Voltage Transformers
05 Isolation Transformers
06 Power Factor Correction Banks
07 Voltage Regulators & Stabilizers
08 Copper Busbar
09 Conduit Systems
+5 MORE
DURBOLT POWER · PRODUCT CATALOGUE 2025
DIV. 02 — Power Distribution & Control
PRODUCT 01 OF 14
P.19
Modular Electrical Switchgear
Modular Electrical Switchgear — Durbolt Power
DIV. 02

Modular Electrical Switchgear

LV/MV modular, 630A–6300A, IEC 61439

Electrical
Voltage Class LV (up to 1,000V AC) / MV (up to 36kV)
Current Rating 630A – 6,300A (main busbar)
Short-circuit Icw 50kA / Ics 65kA (LV); 40kA (MV)
Breaker Withdrawable ACB / MCCB / VCB (MV)
Construction
Form Factor Form 4b type 2 (fully compartmentalized)
Enclosure IP31 indoor (standard); IP54 with door seal
Busbar Copper, tinned, rated per IEC 60439
Frame Welded steel, powder-coated RAL 7035
Testing
Type Type-tested (TTA) per IEC 61439
Arc Flash Available per IEEE 1584
CERTIFICATIONS
IEC 61439-1/2 CE ISO 9001:2015 IEEE 1584
APPLICATIONS

Power Distribution · Data Centers · Industrial Plants · Substations · Commercial Buildings

Unit configuration, color, and finish may vary depending on project requirements and specifications.

REQUEST QUOTE SALES@DURBOLT.COM →
DIV. 02 — Power Distribution & Control
PRODUCT 02 OF 14
P.20
Motor Control Centers (MCC)
Motor Control Centers (MCC) — Durbolt Power
DIV. 02

Motor Control Centers (MCC)

800A–3200A, fixed or withdrawable units

Electrical
Main Bus Current 800A – 3,200A
Voltage 380V / 400V / 480V (3Φ)
Fault Level 65kA symmetrical (1 sec)
Starter Types DOL, star-delta, soft-start, VFD
Construction
Type Fixed or withdrawable (plug-in) units
Enclosure NEMA 12 / IP42 (standard)
Door Front-access with individual unit interlocks
Busbar Copper, vertical + horizontal, fully shrouded
CERTIFICATIONS
IEC 61439-4 UL 845 NEMA ICS 18
APPLICATIONS

Industrial Motors · Water Treatment · Mining · Oil & Gas · HVAC

Unit configuration, color, and finish may vary depending on project requirements and specifications.

P.21

Busway & Busduct Systems

Copper or aluminum, 800A–5000A

Electrical
Current Rating 800A – 5,000A
Voltage Up to 1,000V AC / 1,500V DC
Conductors Copper (standard) or aluminum
Short-circuit Rating 100kA (1 sec)
Construction
Enclosure Aluminum or powder-coated steel housing
Insulation Epoxy powder (standard); air-insulated (sandwich)
Joint Plug-in or flanged bolted joint
IP Rating IP52 (standard); IP65 outdoor
CERTIFICATIONS
IEC 60439-2 CE UL 857
APPLICATIONS

Power Distribution Risers · Data Centers · Industrial Plants · Commercial Buildings

Unit configuration, color, and finish may vary depending on project requirements and specifications.

DIV. 02 — Power Distribution & Control
PRODUCT 04 OF 14
P.22
Medium Voltage Transformers
Medium Voltage Transformers — Durbolt Power
DIV. 02

Medium Voltage Transformers

11kV/33kV, 100kVA–10MVA, oil or dry type

Electrical
Primary Voltage 6.6kV / 11kV / 22kV / 33kV (±5% tap)
Secondary Voltage 0.4kV / 0.69kV (custom available)
Power Range 100kVA – 10,000kVA
Frequency 50Hz / 60Hz
Construction
Type Oil-immersed or dry-type (cast resin)
Cooling ONAN/ONAF (oil); AN/AF (dry)
Tap Changer Off-load (standard); OLTC on request
BIL 75kV (11kV class); 170kV (33kV class)
Testing
Tests Routine and type tests per IEC 60076-1
Losses Class A0 / B0 (low loss design)
CERTIFICATIONS
IEC 60076 BS 171 CE ISO 9001:2015
APPLICATIONS

Utility Substations · Industrial Plants · Data Centers · Renewable Energy · Commercial Buildings

Unit configuration, color, and finish may vary depending on project requirements and specifications.

DIV. 02 — Power Distribution & Control
PRODUCT 05 OF 14
P.23
Isolation Transformers
Isolation Transformers — Durbolt Power
DIV. 02

Isolation Transformers

Medical grade, K-rated available, <1% impedance

Electrical
Power Range 1kVA – 1,000kVA
Voltage Ratio 1:1 (standard); custom available
Leakage Current <0.1μA (medical IT class)
Impedance <1% (standard); <2.5% (high-impedance)
Medical Grade
IT Class IEC 61557-8, IEC 62353
K-Factor K-1 to K-20 (harmonic-rated models)
Electrostatic Shield Standard (medical / data center)
Application IEC 60601, Data Center, Industrial
CERTIFICATIONS
IEC 61558-2-15 UL 506 CE IEC 62353
APPLICATIONS

Medical Facilities · Data Centers · Semiconductor Fabs · Offshore · Laboratories

Unit configuration, color, and finish may vary depending on project requirements and specifications.

DIV. 02 — Power Distribution & Control
PRODUCT 06 OF 14
P.24
Power Factor Correction Banks
Power Factor Correction Banks — Durbolt Power
DIV. 02

Power Factor Correction Banks

Automatic or fixed, 25–2000kVAR

Electrical
Reactive Power 25kVAR – 2,000kVAR
Voltage 380V / 400V / 415V / 480V (3Φ)
Frequency 50Hz / 60Hz
Target PF 0.95 – 0.99 (adjustable)
Control
Type Automatic (APFC relay) or fixed
Switching Steps 6–24 steps
APFC Relay 12-step auto-regulation, RS-485
Detuning Reactor 5.67% / 7% anti-harmonic (optional)
CERTIFICATIONS
IEC 60831-1/2 CE IEC 61921 IEC 60947-4-1
APPLICATIONS

Industrial Plants · Commercial Buildings · Utilities · Data Centers · HVAC

Unit configuration, color, and finish may vary depending on project requirements and specifications.

Alloy C11000 (ETP copper, 99.9% purity)

Conductivity ≥100% IACS
Surface Bare, electro-tinned, or silver-plated
Dimensions
Standard Profiles 20×3mm to 120×10mm

Length Standard 3m / 6m; custom cut available
Tolerance ±0.1mm (profile), ±5mm (length)

APPLICATIONS

PRODUCT 09 OF 14
P.27
Conduit Systems
Conduit Systems — Durbolt Power
DIV. 02

Conduit Systems

EMT/IMC/RMC, 1/2" to 6", hot-dip galvanized

Types & Sizes
EMT Electrical Metallic Tubing, trade sizes 1/2" – 4"
IMC Intermediate Metal Conduit, 1/2" – 4"
RMC Rigid Metal Conduit, 1/2" – 6"
Finish Hot-dip galvanized (HDG), zinc-coated
Mechanical
Wall Thickness Per ANSI C80.1 / C80.3 / C80.6
Length Standard 3m / 3.66m / 6m per trade size
Fittings Full line — couplings, connectors, LBs, ells, locknuts
NEC Listed per Articles 358, 342, 344

DIV. 02 — Power Distribution & Control
PRODUCT 10 OF 14
P.28
Cable Trays & Ladder Racks
Cable Trays & Ladder Racks — Durbolt Power
DIV. 02

Cable Trays & Ladder Racks

Ladder / perforated / wire mesh, HDG or SS

Types
Ladder Tray 4"–24" wide (100mm – 600mm)
Perforated Tray 50mm – 400mm wide
Wire Mesh Tray Galvanized wire, 50–600mm wide
Rung Spacing 9" (225mm) standard; 6" (150mm) heavy-duty
Materials & Load
Finish Hot-dip galvanized (HDG), SS 316L, PVC-coated
Load Rating Light ≤50kg/m / Medium ≤75kg/m / Heavy ≤100kg/m
Side Rail Height 100mm, 75mm, 50mm
CERTIFICATIONS
IEC 61537 NEMA VE 1/2 UL 2367 ASTM A123
APPLICATIONS

Power Cable Management · Data Center Infrastructure · Industrial Plants · Offshore

Unit configuration, color, and finish may vary depending on project requirements and specifications.

DIV. 02 — Power Distribution & Control
PRODUCT 11 OF 14
P.29
Grounding & Bonding Equipment
Grounding & Bonding Equipment — Durbolt Power
DIV. 02

Grounding & Bonding Equipment

Ground rods, compression lugs, bonding kits

Ground Rods
Material Copper-clad steel (CCS), 99.9% copper layer
Diameter 5/8" (16mm), 3/4" (19mm)
Length 5ft (1.5m), 8ft (2.4m), 10ft (3.0m)
Copper Thickness ≥0.25mm per IEEE 837
Compression Lugs & Connectors
Wire Range #6 AWG – 500kcmil
Material Electrolytic copper (EC grade)
Plating Tin-plated (standard)
Type One-hole, two-hole, inline splice
CERTIFICATIONS
IEEE 837 UL 467 ANSI C33.13
APPLICATIONS

Electrical Safety · Lightning Protection · Telecoms · Data Centers · Utilities

Unit configuration, color, and finish may vary depending on project requirements and specifications.

DIV. 02 — Power Distribution & Control
PRODUCT 12 OF 14
P.30
Modular Data Center Power Skids
Modular Data Center Power Skids — Durbolt Power
DIV. 02

Modular Data Center Power Skids

400V–480V, prefab, factory tested, 1–4 MW

Electrical
Input Voltage 480V / 400V (3Φ)
Power Range 1MW – 4MW per skid
Short-circuit Rating 65kA
Main Switch Air circuit breaker (ACB), drawout
Features
Monitoring DCIM-ready, SNMP, Modbus TCP/IP
Busbar Copper, 99.9%, rated to 105°C
Factory Testing Full load FAT (Factory Acceptance Test)
Delivery Skid-mounted, fully assembled, plug-and-play
CERTIFICATIONS
CE IEC 61439-2 UL 891 TIA-942
APPLICATIONS

Data Centers · Colocation Facilities · Edge Computing · Hyperscale

Unit configuration, color, and finish may vary depending on project requirements and specifications.

DIV. 02 — Power Distribution & Control
PRODUCT 13 OF 14
P.31
Three-Phase Hybrid Solar Inverters
Three-Phase Hybrid Solar Inverters — Durbolt Power
DIV. 02

Three-Phase Hybrid Solar Inverters

8kW–20kW, built-in MPPT, LiFePO4 compatible, grid-tie and off-grid modes

AC Output
AC Power 8kW – 20kW (3Φ)
AC Voltage 220V/380V (L/L-N), ±2%
Frequency 50Hz / 60Hz (±0.2Hz)
THD <2%
Solar Input (MPPT)
MPPT Channels 2–3 (model-dependent)
Max PV Voltage 1,000V DC
MPPT Voltage Range 200V – 850V DC
Max PV Current 25A per MPPT
Battery
Chemistry LiFePO4 (preferred); LTO, lead-acid compatible
Voltage Range 40V – 60V DC (48V nominal)
Max Charge Current 100A
Monitoring Wi-Fi / RS-485, cloud app
CERTIFICATIONS
CE IEC 62109-1/2 VDE 0126-1-1 G99 IEEE 1547
APPLICATIONS

Commercial Solar · Industrial Microgrids · Agricultural · C&I Storage

Unit configuration, color, and finish may vary depending on project requirements and specifications.

DIV. 02 — Power Distribution & Control
PRODUCT 14 OF 14
P.32
Mobile EV Charging Station with Integrated BESS
Mobile EV Charging Station with Integrated BESS — Durbolt Power
DIV. 02

Mobile EV Charging Station with Integrated BESS

100kWh–500kWh onboard storage, 240kW DC fast charge, no grid connection required

Energy Storage
Onboard BESS 100kWh – 500kWh (LFP)
Cycle Life ≥6,000 cycles at 80% DoD
SoC Operating Range 20% – 95%
Thermal Management Liquid-cooled battery system
EV Charging
Charging Power 60kW – 240kW DC (per charger)
Connector Standards CCS1, CCS2, CHAdeMO, GB/T
Simultaneous Ports 2–6 (model-dependent)
Payment RFID, OCPP 2.0, credit card optional
Mobility
Platform Road-legal trailer or containerized skid
Grid Independence 100% battery-only operation
Grid Recharge 3Φ input 50kW–100kW (optional)
CERTIFICATIONS
CE IEC 61851-23 ISO 15118 OCPP 2.0 IEC 62619
APPLICATIONS

Temporary EV Charging · Events · Emergency Response · Construction Sites · Off-grid Charging

Unit configuration, color, and finish may vary depending on project requirements and specifications.

03
DURBOLT POWER
DIVISION 03
DIVISION 03 — 13 PRODUCTS

Connectivity & Cooling

Everything connected. Everything cooled.

Fiber optic cable, armored power cable, precision cooling, EV charging, and hybrid renewable energy skids — the full connectivity and thermal stack for modern infrastructure.

01 ADSS Fiber Optic Cable
02 GYXTW Fiber Optic Cable
03 Drop Fiber Optic Cable
04 Armored Power Cable
05 Medium Voltage Cable
06 Control & Instrumentation Cable
07 Industrial Chillers
08 Cooling Towers
09 Precision Air Conditioning
+4 MORE
DURBOLT POWER · PRODUCT CATALOGUE 2025
DIV. 03 — Connectivity & Cooling
PRODUCT 01 OF 13
P.33
ADSS Fiber Optic Cable
ADSS Fiber Optic Cable — Durbolt Power
DIV. 03

ADSS Fiber Optic Cable

6–144 fiber, G652D/G657A, span up to 800m

Fiber
Fiber Count 6 – 144 fibers
Fiber Type G.652D (standard SM); G.657A (bend-insensitive)
Attenuation @ 1310nm ≤0.35 dB/km
Attenuation @ 1550nm ≤0.22 dB/km
Cable
Structure Central tube + peripheral fiber bundles, AT-free
Strength Member Aramid yarn (ADSS, self-supporting)
Outer Jacket UV-resistant HDPE
Span Length Up to 800m (per wind/ice loading spec)
CERTIFICATIONS
IEC 60794-1 IEC 60794-4-20 ITU-T G.652.D ITU-T G.657.A Telcordia GR-20-CORE
APPLICATIONS

Aerial Power Utility Lines · Rural Broadband · Long-span Telecom · Self-supporting Aerial

Unit configuration, color, and finish may vary depending on project requirements and specifications.

REQUEST QUOTE SALES@DURBOLT.COM →
DIV. 03 — Connectivity & Cooling
PRODUCT 02 OF 13
P.34
GYXTW Fiber Optic Cable
GYXTW Fiber Optic Cable — Durbolt Power
DIV. 03

GYXTW Fiber Optic Cable

2–24 fiber, direct burial, loose tube, G652D

Fiber
Fiber Count 2 – 24 fibers (standard)
Fiber Type G.652D single-mode (ITU-T)
Attenuation @ 1310nm ≤0.35 dB/km
Attenuation @ 1550nm ≤0.22 dB/km
Cable
Structure Loose tube, stranded around central FRP rod
Strength Member Steel wire armoring (SWA)
Moisture Barrier Water-blocking gel + tape
Outer Jacket PE (polyethylene), UV-resistant
CERTIFICATIONS
IEC 60794-1-2 ITU-T G.652.D
APPLICATIONS

Direct Burial Underground · Duct Installation · Aerial Lashed · Campus Networks

Unit configuration, color, and finish may vary depending on project requirements and specifications.

REQUEST QUOTE SALES@DURBOLT.COM →
DIV. 03 — Connectivity & Cooling
PRODUCT 03 OF 13
P.35
Drop Fiber Optic Cable
Drop Fiber Optic Cable — Durbolt Power
DIV. 03

Drop Fiber Optic Cable

FTTH flat drop, G657A.2, 2-core, PE jacket

Fiber
Fiber Count 1 or 2 fibers (flat drop)
Fiber Type G.657A.2 single-mode (bend-insensitive)
Attenuation @ 1310nm ≤0.35 dB/km
Attenuation @ 1550nm ≤0.20 dB/km
Cable
Structure Flat drop (figure-8 or bow-type)
Jacket LSZH or PE, black
Strength Member Steel wire or FRP (non-metallic)
Cable OD ~2.0 × 3.5mm (figure-8)
CERTIFICATIONS
IEC 60794-3-10 ITU-T G.657.A.2
APPLICATIONS

FTTH Last-mile Drop · In-building Distribution · Aerial Self-supporting

Unit configuration, color, and finish may vary depending on project requirements and specifications.

DIV. 03 — Connectivity & Cooling
PRODUCT 04 OF 13
P.36
Armored Power Cable
Armored Power Cable — Durbolt Power
DIV. 03

Armored Power Cable

SWA/STA, 4-core, 16–630mm², 0.6/1kV

Electrical
Voltage Rating 0.6/1kV (Uo/U)
Conductor Copper, class 2 stranded
Cross-Section 16mm² – 630mm² (per core)
Cores 4-core (3P+N) standard; 3-core, 5-core available
Construction
Insulation XLPE or PVC (70°C / 90°C)
Armor SWA (steel wire armor) or STA (steel tape armor)
Outer Sheath PVC, PE (direct burial), or LSZH
Temperature Rating 90°C conductor; -40°C to +90°C operating
CERTIFICATIONS
IEC 60502-1 BS 6346 CE
APPLICATIONS

Industrial Plants · Underground Distribution · Renewable Energy · Marine & Offshore

Unit configuration, color, and finish may vary depending on project requirements and specifications.

P.37
Medium Voltage Cable
Medium Voltage Cable — Durbolt Power
DIV. 03

Medium Voltage Cable

6kV–35kV XLPE, single or 3-core, EPR option

Electrical
Voltage Rating 6kV, 10kV, 15kV, 20kV, 33kV, 35kV
Conductor Copper or aluminum (class 2)
Cross-Section 35mm² – 630mm²
Cores Single-core, 3-core, or trefoil arrangement
Construction
Insulation XLPE (cross-linked polyethylene)
Screen Semi-conducting + copper wire/tape screen
Armor SWA or STA (optional)
Outer Sheath HDPE or PVC
CERTIFICATIONS
IEC 60502-2 IEC 60228 CE
APPLICATIONS

Utility Distribution · Industrial Substations · Renewable Energy · Offshore · Rail

DIV. 03 — Connectivity & Cooling

P.38
Control & Instrumentation Cable
Control & Instrumentation Cable — Durbolt Power
DIV. 03

Control & Instrumentation Cable

4–37 core, OS/IS shielded, -40°C to +90°C

Electrical
Core Count 4 – 37 cores
Conductor 0.5mm² – 2.5mm² (Cu, class 2)
Voltage 300/500V (C&I) or 600/1,000V (power grade)
Shielding OS (overall), IS (individual), or OS+IS
Construction
Insulation PVC (70°C) or XLPE (90°C)
Shield Aluminum-Mylar tape + drain wire
Outer Jacket PVC (standard); LSZH (IEC 60332-3-24)
Temperature -40°C to +90°C
CERTIFICATIONS
IEC 60227 IEC 60228 CE IEC 60332-3-24
APPLICATIONS

Process Control · Instrumentation · SCADA · PLC Systems · Hazardous Areas

Unit configuration, color, and finish may vary depending on project requirements and specifications.

DIV. 03 — Connectivity & Cooling
PRODUCT 07 OF 13
P.39
Industrial Chillers
Industrial Chillers — Durbolt Power
DIV. 03

Industrial Chillers

Air/water cooled, 20–3,000 ton, screw / scroll / centrifugal

Capacity
Cooling Capacity 20 ton – 3,000 ton (70kW – 10,500kW)
Compressor Scroll (<50 ton), screw (50–500 ton), centrifugal (>500 ton)
Refrigerant R-134a / R-410A / R-407C / R-1234ze (low-GWP)
COP ≥4.2 (water-cooled); ≥3.0 (air-cooled)
Configuration
Condensing Air-cooled or water-cooled
Evaporator Flooded shell-and-tube or brazed plate HX
Leaving Water Temp 6–7°C standard; -5°C (process chilling)
Variable Speed VFD on compressor + pumps (standard)
CERTIFICATIONS
CE PED 2014/68/EU AHRI 550/590 ASHRAE 90.1
APPLICATIONS

Data Centers · Process Cooling · Plastics · Food & Beverage · Chemical Plants

Unit configuration, color, and finish may vary depending on project requirements and specifications.

DIV. 03 — Connectivity & Cooling
PRODUCT 08 OF 13
P.40
Cooling Towers
Cooling Towers — Durbolt Power
DIV. 03

Cooling Towers

Counterflow FRP, 50–2000 ton, low noise

Capacity
Cooling Capacity 50 ton – 2,000 ton (175kW – 7,000kW)
Flow Rate 7–280 L/s (model-dependent)
Design Entering Water 35°C
Design Leaving Water 29°C
Construction
Type Induced-draft counterflow
Structure FRP (fiberglass-reinforced polymer)
Fan Propeller type, aluminum blades
Fill PVC film or splash fill (per application)
CERTIFICATIONS
CTI STD-201RS IE3 fan motor
APPLICATIONS

Process Cooling · HVAC Condensers · Power Plant Cooling · Data Centers

Unit configuration, color, and finish may vary depending on project requirements and specifications.

P.41
Precision Air Conditioning
Precision Air Conditioning — Durbolt Power
DIV. 03

Precision Air Conditioning

CRAC/CRAH, 15–300kW per unit, N+1 config

Capacity
Cooling Capacity 15kW – 100kW per unit
Sensible Heat Ratio ≥0.95
Type CRAC (DX) or CRAH (chilled water)
Airflow 2,500 – 20,000 CFM (model-dependent)
Configuration
Redundancy N+1 modular design
Refrigerant (CRAC) R-410A / R-407C
Chilled Water (CRAH) 7/12°C supply/return
Fan EC fan (variable speed, high efficiency)
Control
Controller Microprocessor-based
Communications BACnet/IP, Modbus TCP/IP
Monitoring SNMP, remote access, predictive alarms
CERTIFICATIONS
CE AHRI 1360 IEC 60297
APPLICATIONS

Data Centers · Server Rooms · Telecoms · Control Rooms · Medical Imaging

Connector Standards CCS1, CCS2, CHAdeMO (multi-standard)
Protocol OCPP 2.0 / 1.6 (backward compatible)
Simultaneous Vehicles 1–2 per unit (model-dependent)
Electrical
Input 3Φ 380V – 480V, 50/60Hz
Power Factor ≥0.99
IP Rating IP54 (outdoor-rated)
Features
Payment RFID, QR code, credit card, OCPP backend
Display 7" touchscreen, multilingual

Telecom & 5G Tower Battery Systems

48V LiFePO4 rack-mount, 100Ah–200Ah, RS485/CAN comms, 4G/5G base station backup

Electrical
Nominal Voltage 48V DC (standard telecom)
Capacity 100Ah – 200Ah per rack-mount unit
Scalable 1–8 units per cabinet
Chemistry LiFePO4 (LFP)
Communications
Protocol RS-485, CAN bus, RS-232, dry contact
Remote Monitoring Web-based, SNMP trap, 4G optional
BMS SOC/SOH estimation, active cell balancing
Mechanical
Form Factor 19" rack-mount, 1U – 3U
Operating Temp -20°C to +55°C
IP Rating IP20 (indoor); IP55 (outdoor cabinet)
CERTIFICATIONS
IEC 62619 UL 1973 CE ETSI EN 300 132-2 Telcordia GR-63-CORE

02 High-Capacity Containerized BESS

DIV. 04 — Grid-Scale Energy Infrastructure
PRODUCT 01 OF 02
P.46
Containerized Grid-Scale BESS
Containerized Grid-Scale BESS — Durbolt Power
DIV. 04

Containerized Grid-Scale BESS

1MWh–5MWh per container, scalable to 100MWh+ multi-container, turnkey PCS+BMS+EMS

Energy
Usable Capacity 1MWh – 5MWh per container
Chemistry LiFePO4 (LFP)
Cycle Life ≥8,000 cycles at 90% DoD
Calendar Life 20+ years
Power
PCS Power 500kW – 2.5MW
DC Bus Voltage 800V – 1,500V
AC Output 3Φ 380V / 400V / 480V / 690V
Grid Response <100ms
Container & Systems
Container Size 20ft or 40ft ISO (ISBU-grade)
IP Rating IP54 (entire container)
Cooling Precision air-conditioning (N+1)
Fire Suppression FM-200 or aerosol system
CERTIFICATIONS
IEC 62619 UL 9540 UN 38.3 CE NFPA 855 IEEE 1547
APPLICATIONS

Frequency Regulation · Peak Shaving · Grid Stabilization · Renewable Firming · Black Start

Unit configuration, color, and finish may vary depending on project requirements and specifications.

P.47

DIV. 04

High-Capacity Containerized BESS

2MWh–10MWh, 20ft/40ft container, liquid-cooled, integrated PCS+BMS+EMS+fire suppression

Energy
Usable Capacity 2MWh – 10MWh per container
Chemistry LiFePO4 (LFP)
Cycle Life ≥10,000 cycles at 90% DoD
Calendar Life 25+ years
Power
PCS Power 1MW – 5MW
DC Bus Voltage 1,500V (C&I standard)
AC Output 3Φ 380V / 400V / 480V / 690V
Grid Response <20ms (black start capable)
Container & Systems
Container Size 20ft or 40ft ISO (heavy-duty)
Cooling Liquid-cooled (cell-level thermal management)
Fire Suppression FM-200 integrated detection + suppression
Communications IEC 61850, Modbus TCP, DNP3
CERTIFICATIONS
IEC 62619 UL 9540A UN 38.3 CE NFPA 855 FERC Order 841
APPLICATIONS
